---
title: "Flight Delay"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    code-links: 
      - text: GitHub Repo
        icon: github
        target: _blank
        href: https://github.com/GW-ML-Flight/Flight-Delay
# jupyter: python3
toc: true
number-sections: true
bibliography: references.bib
author:
    - name: Max Eichholz
      email: m.eichholz@gwu.edu
    - name: Liza Mozolyuk
      email: lizamozolyuk@gwu.edu
    - name: Zack Rahbar
      email: zackrahbar@gwu.edu
    - name: Lauren Schmidt
      email: laurenschmidt@gwu.edu
    - name: Ozzy Simpson
      email: ozzy@gwu.edu
---

## Introduction

## Methods

### Data

### Model

### Measuring Success

## Results

## Future Work

## References
::: {#refs}
:::
